capability_objective: Review record pro-270 (Annual report edits) and record pro-670 (Workshop feedback summary) together. After both current records are returned, change Annual report edits from in-progress to ready and Workshop feedback summary from blocked to in-progress, but only for each record whose retrieved status still matches the stated starting status. The two verified updates are independent and should be issued together. Do not search, cancel, create, or notify.
prompt: Use the executable ./recordctl in this workspace to carry out the following request. Review record pro-270 (Annual report edits) and record pro-670 (Workshop feedback summary) together. Wait until both current records have been returned. Then change Annual report edits from in-progress to ready and Workshop feedback summary from blocked to in-progress, but only for each record whose retrieved status still matches the stated starting status. Treat the two guarded changes independently and issue all qualifying changes together. Do not search, cancel, create, or notify. Do not edit .records directly, and do not modify the executable or the verifier; record reads and changes must be performed through ./recordctl.
